moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Championships, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Centre Court ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up two weeks of unmissable tennis starting tomorrow. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: UK Pride
angles.copy: It's almost time for the greatest tennis tournament in the world to get underway in London! Wimbledon is back from Monday.

moments.title: Tour de France Grand Départ
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on July 4th in Barcelona, with 21 stages of gruelling cycling culminating in Paris on July 26th.

angles.name: Race Start
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling! The Tour de France 2026 starts this Saturday in Barcelona. Who's your favourite for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Global Event
angles.copy: Beyond the UK, the biggest cycling race on the planet, the Tour de France, begins this weekend. Expect stunning scenery and fierce competition.

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Plays Exeter
moments.blurb: Scottish superstar Lewis Capaldi performs live at Powderham Castle in Exeter today, bringing his chart-topping hits to the South West.

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi is LIVE at Powderham Castle tonight! If you're heading there, get ready for an incredible show. What song are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Gig Buzz
angles.copy: Exeter, are you ready for Lewis Capaldi? He's performing at Powderham Castle today – massive tunes guaranteed!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for June 25 - July 1 is out, with Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' having debuted at #1 on June 5.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is in! What's your favourite track making waves this week?

angles.name: Current #1
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Ariana Grande's 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' hitting #1 earlier this month. What a track!

moments.title: New Album Releases This Week
moments.blurb: Friday, July 3rd sees new albums from Madonna ('Confessions II'), Deep Purple ('Splat!'), Ken Carson, Natasha Hamilton, and Mary in the Junkyard ('Role Model Hermit').

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: New Music Friday is coming! This week, look out for fresh albums from Madonna, Deep Purple, and exciting new band Mary in the Junkyard.

angles.name: Anticipated Releases
angles.copy: What are you most excited for? Madonna and Deep Purple both drop new albums this Friday! A huge week for music lovers.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on June 29th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the amazing Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday! Send her some love!

moments.title: Happy Birthday RZA
moments.blurb: Founding member and de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, RZA, turns 57 on July 5th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the legendary RZA's 57th birthday this Sunday! What's your go-to Wu-Tang Clan track?

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: The mastermind behind so much iconic hip-hop, RZA, turns 57 on July 5th. Massive respect!

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Rap Superstar
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 next Monday. What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: Music & Movies
angles.copy: From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to Hollywood, 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th. An absolute legend!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 next Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: An absolute legend of music! Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th. Send him your best wishes!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jaden Smith
moments.blurb: Actor and musician Jaden Smith, known for his roles in 'The Pursuit of Happyness' and his music career, turns 28 on July 8th.

angles.name: Young Talent
angles.copy: Happy 28th Birthday to the multi-talented Jaden Smith next Wednesday! What's your favourite of his tracks or films?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Jaden Smith turns 28 on July 8th! Get ready to celebrate the artist and actor.

moments.title: Northern Ireland & Scottish School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer holidays officially begin for schools in Northern Ireland on July 1st, with some Scottish schools also breaking up this week.

angles.name: School's Out NI
angles.copy: Northern Ireland, the summer holidays officially kick off this Wednesday for schools! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Scottish Break
angles.copy: Many schools across Scotland are breaking up for summer this week! Enjoy the well-deserved break!

moments.title: Exeter Tribute & Jazz Gigs
moments.blurb: Exeter Phoenix hosts Just Radiohead (July 3rd) and AC-DC UK (July 4th), while Jazz at the Mermaid offers a monthly night on July 1st.

angles.name: Tribute Nights
angles.copy: Love Radiohead or AC/DC? Exeter Phoenix has you covered this week with top tribute acts Just Radiohead (Fri) and AC-DC UK (Sat)! What's your favourite track from these legends?

angles.name: Jazz in Exeter
angles.copy: For something smoother, Jazz at the Mermaid is back this Wednesday for its popular monthly night! Get your cool on.
